rank_sensitivity.note: rank 3 chosen a priori: the cardiac dipole is 3-D (X,Y,Z).

diagnosis_sensitivity.reference: map is trained on NORM; angle to an MI-fit subspace per segment

lineage.segment_def: neurokit2-dwt on observed Lead II; P=Pon..Poff, QRS=Ron..Roff, ST=J..Ton, T=Ton..Toff
lineage.map_is: deterministic function of estimated M_s and S; not evaluated on held-out records
